mapper.select: /* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.selectAlimUnrdCnt 설 명 : 알림 유형별 읽지 않은 건수 조회 */ SELECT NVL(PUSH_CNT, 0) AS PUSH_CNT, NVL(SMS_CNT, 0) AS SMS_CNT, NVL(SHRTNT_CNT, 0) AS SHRTNT_CNT, NVL(ALIMTALK_CNT, 0) AS ALIMTALK_CNT, NVL(PUSH_CNT, 0) + NVL(SMS_CNT, 0) + NVL(SHRTNT_CNT, 0) + NVL(ALIMTALK_CNT, 0) AS TOTAL_UNRD_CNT FROM ( SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON A.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND A.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'PUSH' AND A.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' AND T.READ_YN = 'N') AS PUSH_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON A.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND A.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'SMS' AND A.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' AND T.READ_YN = 'N') AS SMS_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON A.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND A.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' AND A.SNDNGYN = 'Y' AND T.READ_YN = 'N') AS SHRTNT_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON A.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND A.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'ALIM_TALK' AND A.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' AND T.READ_YN = 'N') AS ALIMTALK_CNT FROM DUAL )

/* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.selectShrtntList 설 명 : 쪽지 최근 목록 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG_ID AS SNDNG_ID, A.MSG_ID, S.SBJCTNM, A.SNDNGR_ID, A.SNDNGNM, A.SNDNG_TTL, A.SNDNG_CTS, A.SNDNG_DTTM, T.READ_DTTM, T.READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.SNDNG_DTTM DESC) AS RNUM FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG M ON A.MSG_ID = M.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON M.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON A.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND A.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' AND A.SNDNGYN = 'Y' ) WHERE RNUM <= #{listCnt}

/* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.selectPushList 설 명 : PUSH 최근 목록 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.MSG_MBL_SNDNG_ID AS SNDNG_ID, A.MSG_ID, S.SBJCTNM, A.SNDNGNM, A.SNDNG_TTL, A.SNDNG_CTS, A.SNDNG_DTTM, T.READ_DTTM, T.READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.SNDNG_DTTM DESC) AS RNUM FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG M ON A.MSG_ID = M.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON M.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON A.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND A.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'PUSH' AND A.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' ) WHERE RNUM <= #{listCnt}

/* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.selectSmsList 설 명 : SMS 최근 목록 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.MSG_MBL_SNDNG_ID AS SNDNG_ID, A.MSG_ID, S.SBJCTNM, A.SNDNGNM, A.SNDNG_TTL, A.SNDNG_CTS, A.SNDNG_DTTM, T.READ_DTTM, T.READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.SNDNG_DTTM DESC) AS RNUM FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG M ON A.MSG_ID = M.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON M.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON A.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND A.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'SMS' AND A.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' ) WHERE RNUM <= #{listCnt}

/* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.selectAlimtalkList 설 명 : 알림톡 최근 목록 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.MSG_MBL_SNDNG_ID AS SNDNG_ID, A.MSG_ID, S.SBJCTNM, A.SNDNGNM, A.SNDNG_TTL, A.SNDNG_CTS, A.SNDNG_DTTM, T.READ_DTTM, T.READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.SNDNG_DTTM DESC) AS RNUM FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG M ON A.MSG_ID = M.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON M.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON A.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND A.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'ALIM_TALK' AND A.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' ) WHERE RNUM <= #{listCnt}
